headline: Rising gas prices could offset any tax refunds for US consumers
summary: US consumers may be in for a surprise as the Iran war stirs up price shocks for oil (CL=F, BZ=F) and gas (RB=F), ultimately limiting Americans' spending power for discretionary purchases and offsetting the benefits of tax refunds. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma comes on Market Domination to outline the impact of added geopolitical pressures on consumers. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

headline: Assessing Dollar General (DG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum Shift
summary: With no single headline driving attention today, Dollar General (DG) is drawing interest as investors weigh its recent share performance, current valuation metrics, and the scale of its US$42.7b revenue discount retail business. See our latest analysis for Dollar General. Dollar General’s recent share price pullback, including a 1 day share price return of 6.14% and a 7 day share price return of 7.23%, contrasts with its 1 year total shareholder return of 73.79%. Recent momentum looks weaker...

headline: How $200 Oil Impacts Your Stocks and Your Wallet
summary: Oil is sitting at $96 a barrel as of March 13, 2026, up from $71 just ten days ago. The Iran war has effectively closed the Strait of Hormuz, through which roughly 20% of the world’s daily oil supply flows. Analysts and the Financial Times are now openly discussing a path to $200 crude. Stifel ... How $200 Oil Impacts Your Stocks and Your Wallet

headline: Dollar General Stock Dips: Time to Buy?
summary: A massive fourth-quarter earnings beat wasn't enough to impress investors after Dollar General issued a cautious outlook for the year ahead.

headline: Why Dollar General (DG) Is Down 7.2% After Tempered 2026 Outlook Despite Strong Q4 Results
summary: Dollar General Corporation recently reported its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results, with quarterly sales of US$10,911.2 million and net income of US$426.3 million, alongside full-year sales of US$42.72 billion and net income of US$1.51 billion, while also affirming a US$0.59 quarterly dividend and updating its share repurchase progress. Despite reporting higher earnings per share and solid same-store sales growth, Dollar General’s new fiscal 2026 guidance for more modest net sales...

headline: DG Q4 Deep Dive: Value Initiatives and Efficiency Programs Shape 2026 Outlook
summary: Discount retailer Dollar General (NYSE:DG) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q4 CY2025, with sales up 5.9% year on year to $10.91 billion. Its GAAP profit of $1.93 per share was 17.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Guggenheim Maintains Buy on Dollar General, Lowers Price Target to $160
summary: Guggenheim  analyst John Heinbockel   maintains Dollar General (NYSE:DG) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $165 to $160.

headline: Oil Shock, Private Credit Cracks & Adobe's Bittersweet Beat
summary: Brent crude punched through $100 a barrel for the first time since 2022, Iran's new Supreme Leader vowed to keep the Strait of Hormuz closed, and a simmering private credit crisis finally boiled over onto bank stock prices — all in a single Thursday session. Welcome to the new normal.

headline: Dow Tumbles More Than 700 Points: Investor Sentiment Declines, Fear & Greed Index In 'Extreme Fear' Zone
summary: The CNN Fear & Greed Index rose to Extreme Fear zone as US stocks fell due to rising oil prices and concerns over Iran.
